expectations.text: Preserves the existing prefillTransformer (does not replace it wholesale)
expectations.evidence: Extends the existing transformer by adding ssn, vaFileNumber, fullName at root level while preserving the existing veteran.ssnLastFour and veteran.vaFileLastFour mappings. Existing form-specific data retained.

expectations.text: Adds both prefill pages to a chapter in formConfig
expectations.evidence: Adds ...profilePersonalInfoPage() and ...profileContactInfoPages() to infoPages chapter, positioned before existing veteranInfo page.

expectations.text: Ensures the existing prefillTransformer output includes ssn, vaFileNumber, and fullName (or configures dataAdapter if nested)
expectations.evidence: Extended transformer returns ssn, vaFileNumber, fullName at root level. SSN at root avoids needing dataAdapter, as noted: 'SSN at root avoids needing dataAdapter in Step 4.'

expectations.text: Does not break existing form chapters or page definitions
expectations.evidence: Existing veteranInfo, housingRisk, livingSituation, otherHousingRisk, contact pages, and other chapters all remain unchanged.

quality_bonuses.text: Uses dataAdapter to locate nested SSN/vaFileNumber rather than restructuring the transformer output
quality_bonuses.evidence: Chose to extend the transformer by adding fields at root level instead of using dataAdapter. This is valid but the alternative approach (dataAdapter + no transformer changes) was available.

quality_bonuses.text: Explains why the existing transformer is left unchanged
quality_bonuses.evidence: Transformer was extended (case 2 from skill decision tree — missing fields), so this bonus doesn't apply.

quality_notes: Perfect base score. Quality bonuses don't apply well to this scenario — the 995 transformer was missing ssn/vaFileNumber/fullName entirely (skill decision tree case 2: EXTEND), so using dataAdapter alone wouldn't work. The bonuses are better suited for case 1 (transformer already sufficient). Both bonuses are somewhat misaligned with the actual scenario.
